mapper.select: SELECT account_id, phone, status, last_active_identity_id, last_active_identity_type FROM t_account WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_account (phone, real_name, real_name_verified, status) VALUES ( #{phone}, #{realName,typeHandler=com.pangu.infrastructure.persistence.handler.Sm4EncryptTypeHandler}, #{realNameVerified}, 1 )
INSERT INTO c_user (account_id, auth_level) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{authLevel}) ON CONFLICT (account_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT uid FROM c_user WHERE account_id = #{accountId} LIMIT 1
SELECT account_id, phone, real_name AS real_name_cipher, real_name_verified, status FROM t_account WHERE account_id = #{accountId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_account SET real_name = #{realName,typeHandler=com.pangu.infrastructure.persistence.handler.Sm4EncryptTypeHandler}, id_card_encrypted = #{idCardNumber,typeHandler=com.pangu.infrastructure.persistence.handler.Sm4EncryptTypeHandler}, real_name_verified = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
UPDATE t_account SET last_active_identity_id = #{identityId}, last_active_identity_type = #{identityType}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
UPDATE c_user SET last_active_tenant_id = #{tenantId}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE uid = #{uid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_account_wechat_identity (account_id, mini_program_app_id, subject_hash, last_login_time) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{miniProgramAppId}, #{subjectHash}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
